seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least 200 words, with no paragraph exceeding 50 words.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email must contain at least 200 words, with no paragraph exceeding 50 words.
response:
Dear Alex, I am writing to formally confirm that your vacation request for the upcoming month has been approved. I appreciate you submitting the dates well in advance. This allows our team to plan projects effectively while you are away. Your hard work is truly valued.

Please ensure that all your current tasks are completed or handed over before you leave. I would like you to coordinate with your colleagues to cover your responsibilities. This will ensure a smooth workflow for everyone. Let me know if you need any specific help with this transition.

I hope you have a wonderful and relaxing time off with your family. You certainly deserve a break after your recent achievements on the project. We look forward to seeing you refreshed when you return to the office. Enjoy your well-earned holiday and have a safe trip.<turn|>
